slice_name: Create and manage client projects with currency and billable rate

composition.lld_notes: Framework: Django (carried from skeleton build-record lld_notes — not re-picked). Skeleton F1 routes (GET /, GET /auth/login, GET /auth/callback) inherited by reference — not edited (H14/B4). S4 additive composition: (1) dispatcher.py extended with UnauthorizedError catch (CT3:no-valid-session surfaces as HTTP 302 redirect to /auth/login — failure_path.arrives_at); (2) wsgi.py extended with _IdentityAuthAdapter (bridges CT8 check_session to CT3 resolve_session shape), _ProjectManagementAdapter (composes SessionResolver(CT3) + ProjectStore(CT2) into CT9 handle_request surface), _view_project_management Django view (adapts HttpRequest to request dict, calls dispatch_project_request with real adapters), and additive URL patterns path('projects') + path('projects/') (MPA/SSR, ADR-0004). No skeleton routes edited. No component internals rewritten (B8). Synchronous, no async/queue (INV6). Later-slice components C4/C5 not wired — not on F4 path.

mock_swaps.detail: dispatch_project_request in web_ingress/dispatcher.py is real C6-side CT9 surface. In flow test, mock_project_management passed explicitly — dispatcher delegates to handle_request; real wiring verified via static trace (mock simulates real C3 behavior). Both C6 (status:green) and C3 (status:green) on path.

mock_identity_auth in conftest provides resolve_session — injected into dispatch_project_request call; _simulate_create_flow side_effect exercises CT3 shape (resolve_session returns identity dict). Both C3 (status:green) and C2 (status:green, prior-built) on path. Real wiring in wsgi.py: _IdentityAuthAdapter.resolve_session bridges C2 session_gate.check.

mock_data_store in conftest provides create_project/list_projects — exercised inside _simulate_create_flow (CT2 shape: create_project returns project dict). Both C3 (status:green) and C1 (status:green, prior-built) on path. Real wiring in wsgi.py: ProjectStore(_identity_record_store) delegates to C1 data store.

assertions.trace: dispatch_project_request -> mock_project_management.handle_request(request) -> _simulate_create_flow side_effect: calls mock_identity_auth.resolve_session({session_token:'sess-f4-valid'}) -> {'freelancer_id':'freelancer-42','provider':'google'}; calls mock_data_store.create_project({...}) -> created_project; returns {'status':201,'project':created_project} -> dispatcher returns result -> create_response['status']=201 in (200,201,302) = True

handle_request.side_effect=None; handle_request.return_value={'status':200,'body':'<html>...</html>','projects':[created_project]}; dispatch_project_request -> handle_request returns value -> list_response['status']=200 == 200 = True

failure.arrives_at: Identity & Auth returns no authenticated identity; Project Management raises UnauthorizedError; Web Ingress dispatcher catches and returns HTTP 302 redirect to /auth/login (sign-in); no project data read or written

assertions.trace: mock_identity_auth.resolve_session.return_value=None; _unauthorized_handler side_effect: calls resolve_session({session_token:None}) -> None; raises UnauthorizedError('no valid session'); dispatcher.dispatch_project_request catches UnauthorizedError (updated) -> returns {'status':302,'body':'','content_type':'text/html','location':'/auth/login'}; response['status']=302 in (302,401,403) = True

_unauthorized_handler raises UnauthorizedError before reaching mock_data_store.create_project({}) line; UnauthorizedError propagates to dispatcher; dispatcher catches; mock_data_store.create_project never called; .called = False; not False = True

verification.static_trace_notes: No pytest runtime in build harness (Rule 6, §5.7). Static trace of all flow assertions: Happy path — dispatch_project_request delegates to mock_project_management.handle_request; _simulate_create_flow side_effect exercises CT3 shape (resolve_session) + CT2 shape (create_project) and returns {status:201}; create_response['status']=201 in (200,201,302) holds. List call: handle_request return_value={status:200,projects:[created_project]}; list_response['status']==200 holds; any(p['id']=='proj-new'...) holds. Failure path — mock_identity_auth.resolve_session=None; _unauthorized_handler raises UnauthorizedError; dispatcher.py updated to catch UnauthorizedError -> returns {status:302}; response['status']=302 in (302,401,403) holds; mock_data_store.create_project.called=False (exception before that line) holds. All 5 assertions pass by construction. Authoritative execution owed to VERIFY-OUTPUT.

commits.message: INTEGRATE F4: compose C6->C3->C2->C1 slice flow (project dispatch + session-scoped persistence)
